steps.title: Identify the describing phrases
steps.content: The excavation process is characterized as "hard, physically tiring work" that "can take weeks or even months." These details reveal what type of process it must be.

steps.title: Match word to meaning
steps.content:
The word needs to mean demanding or laborious. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — cheap: low in cost — the passage says nothing about expense, only effort. ✗
  • Choice B — common: occurring frequently — frequency of the task is irrelevant; the passage describes how hard it is. ✗
  • Choice C — rapid: fast — directly contradicted by "weeks or even months." ✗
  • Choice D — difficult: requiring great effort — matches "hard, physically tiring work" and the extended timeline exactly. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
